item.title: KALENDER-Termine Firmen/Märkte am Donnerstag, 12. März
item.author: Reuters Deutscher Textdienst
item.description: DWS Group GmbH & Co KgaA will release its Q4 2025 earnings results on the same day that several other major companies, including Brenntag and Zalando, report their full-year results. This strategic alignment highlights the competitive landscape in the finance and consumer sectors as firms prepare to present their annual performances.
